author: Hemma
name: Hemma Integration Event and Subscriber Pair
description: Scaffolds a versioned integration event in a module contracts project and a subscriber handler in the module.

module.description: The PascalCase module name that owns the event and subscriber scaffold.

manualInstructions.text: Add opts.Discovery.IncludeType<OnEventNameHandler>(); to ModuleNameModule.AddModuleNameHandlers. If the subscriber consumes another module's event, move it to the consuming module and reference only the publisher's .Contracts project.
